phrases.en: She also chopped up some broccoli.
phrases.zh: 她还把一些西兰花切碎。

phrases.en: She put some water in a saucepan.
And put a steamer basket inside.
Then, she put the vegetables in the basket.
phrases.zh: 然后，她把蔬菜放进蒸笼里。

phrases.en: She put a lid on the saucepan and lit the burner under it.
phrases.zh: 她给锅盖上盖子，并点燃了下面的炉火。

phrases.en: The water boiled and steamed the vegetables.
